name: casa-plugins-defaults
_notes: claude-dev → bonzanni/claude-dev (community repo; this is the Casa-maintained plugin-dev pack used locally as 'claude-dev'; no Anthropic-owned repo exists under that name — anthropics/claude-plugins-official calls it 'plugin-dev' but bonzanni/claude-dev is the upstream Casa already uses). skill-creator → anthropics/claude-plugins-official subdir plugins/skill-creator (official Anthropic pack). mcp-server-dev → anthropics/claude-plugins-official subdir plugins/mcp-server-dev (official Anthropic pack). document-skills → anthropics/skills top-level repo (Anthropic monorepo; 'document-skills' is a named pack in its marketplace.json whose skills live under skills/xlsx, skills/docx, skills/pptx, skills/pdf — the whole repo is the plugin source as confirmed by the anthropic-agent-skills marketplace using source: './').

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Superpowers meta-skill pack (brainstorming, writing-plans, subagent-driven-development, executing-plans, requesting-code-review, ...).

plugins.name: claude-dev
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin authoring doctrine (plugin-structure, plugin-settings, agent-development, command-development, hook-development, mcp-integration, skill-development).

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: SKILL.md authoring craft — create new skills, edit existing skills, measure skill performance.

plugins.name: mcp-server-dev
plugins.description: MCP server development — build-mcp-server, build-mcpb, build-mcp-app.
